children.name: Aten Ra

sections.name: Guardian
access_rules: ^$lm2_logic|HasAnkhFor(Aten Ra) and ((IsDead(Sekhmet) or Glitch(Costume Clip)) and PuzzleFinished(White Pedestals) and (((Has(Chain Whip) or (CanUse(Earth Spear) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Earth Spear))) or (CanUse(Flare Gun) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Flare Gun))) or (CanUse(Chakram) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Chakram))) or (CanUse(Bomb) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Bomb)))) and OrbCount(6)) or ((Has(Flail Whip) or Has(Katana) or Has(Axe)) and OrbCount(5)) or ((CanUse(Pistol) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Pistol))) and OrbCount(4))))

sections.name: Aten-Ra's Dissonance
access_rules: ^$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Progressive Beherit) and IsDead(Aten Ra))

access_rules: ^$lm2_cursed|430036|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (IsDead(Aten Ra) and HorizontalAttack)
^$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain)

children.name: Sekhmet
access_rules: ^$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (CanChant(Heaven) and CanChant(Sun) and CanChant(Earth) and OrbCount(3) and (Has(Chain Whip) or Has(Rapier) or Has(Axe) or Has(Katana) or (CanUse(Earth Spear) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Earth Spear))) or (CanUse(Bomb) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Bomb))) or (CanUse(Chakram) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Chakram))) or (CanUse(Pistol) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Pistol)))))

access_rules: ^$lm2_cursed|430147|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (SkullCount(1) and HorizontalAttack and (Has(Feather) or CanWarp or (CanReach(DSLMMain) and (CanUse(Bomb) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Bomb))))))
^$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (SkullCount(1) and (Has(Feather) or CanWarp or (CanReach(DSLMMain) and (CanUse(Bomb) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Bomb))))))

children.name: Ammit
access_rules: ^$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (Has(Feather) and Has(Pyramid Crystal) and Has(Silver Shield) and OrbCount(3) and (Has(Chain Whip) or Has(Knife) or Has(Axe) or Has(Katana) or (CanUse(Earth Spear) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Earth Spear))) or (CanUse(Bomb) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Bomb))) or (CanUse(Chakram) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Chakram))) or (CanUse(Pistol) or (OutOfLogic and Has(Pistol)))))
